original_snippet_context: News article about the recent agreement surrounding the Convênio de Taubaté
relevant_quote: Accordo para immediata execução do Convenio de Taubaté
justification: The text factually mentions the recent agreement concerning the implementation of the Convênio de Taubaté. Though implicit, the fact that the Convênio involves the "valorização do café" scheme may indicate that the "Caixa de Conversão" would follow suit in its aims.
